content: User request: My flight from Tokyo to Sydney has been delayed. Can I find out the compensation rules?
Agent called NO tools — responded with text only.

Verifier: FAILED — avg=0.00 std=0.00 | The agent did not provide any explanation of compensation rules, which was the core of the pass criteria. Instead, it asked for more information, which is a conversational turn but not an answer to the posed question. (score=0.0)
